load_order: Apply preamble as agent instruction layer

source_baseline: approved navbar logo code provided by user

immutable_constants.service_umbrella: Website Design and SEO Services or Digital Marketing Services (both approved and interchangeable)
immutable_constants.signature_text: Serving small businesses as their digital seeds go from darkness to light and grow, if God Almighty is willing.
immutable_constants.signature_rule: show exactly once at the end of major material; always on a single line — never allow it to wrap or fold onto a second line

hard_visual_rules.background_direction_note: major layouts begin darker at the top and become lighter in lower sections
hard_visual_rules.accent_allowance: Use pinks/reds as primary action color. Use new leaf green (e.g. #4ade80, #166534) sparingly for confirmation, success states, or nature-themed flourishes fitting the pomegranate farm motif.

logo_system.origin_note: derived from approved Navbar logo code shared by user
logo_system.stationary_exact_language: Build the pomegranate stationary logo as a horizontal lockup. Use a transparent background. Place a dual-hexagon mark on the left and the lowercase wordmark on the right. Outer hexagon: stroke colour #f43f5e, no fill, subtle glow (0 0 8px rgba(244,63,94,0.8)). Inner hexagon: stroke colour #fda4af, no fill, 50% scale, rotated 90 degrees. Wordmark text must be exactly "pomegranate" in Outfit 900, lowercase only, tight tracking. Default lockup spacing: 12px gap between mark and wordmark. Do not use uppercase, fruit illustrations, or alternate symbols.
logo_system.animated_exact_language: Build the pomegranate animated logo from the stationary logo baseline. Trigger animation on hover and focus-visible of the full lockup. Animate the outer hexagon with a 180-degree rotation around centre in 700ms ease. Keep the inner hexagon static at 90 degrees. Transition wordmark colour from #fff0f5 to #fda4af in 300ms. Allow a soft glow pulse only as low-amplitude support (slow, non-distracting). Idle state must not continuously spin. If prefers-reduced-motion is active, disable rotation and pulse and keep a static logo.

messaging_and_prompt_rules.reader_level_note: understandable for first-time readers, including young teenagers who use search and social platforms
messaging_and_prompt_rules.jargon_buster_section: when generating whole webpage or presentation content, always include a 'plain english jargon buster' section to explain specialist terms in accessible language
messaging_and_prompt_rules.prompt_style_rule: if used, prompts must be plain, non-manipulative, and context-fit
messaging_and_prompt_rules.button_shape_rule: no full-pill buttons; use rounded-lg or rounded-xl

compliance_checks: service framing stays Website Design and SEO Services or Digital Marketing Services umbrella plus four core offers
canonical logo implementation and behaviours followed
prompt policy remains optional, plain, and non-manipulative
approved abstract visual language including optional fractal tree motif
jargon buster section included for whole webpage/presentation content
required responsive widths with no horizontal scroll

reject_conditions: prompt language uses pressure tactics, hype urgency, or manipulation
signature repeated or not at end
logo behaviour or geometry deviates from canonical logo rules
marketing jargon used without plain-language explanation

new_project_setup_steps: copy this JSON and brand_guidelines_ai_agent_preamble.txt into project root
load this JSON as hard constraints before generation
ensure required fonts and icon dependency are available
implement logo using canonical code rules
require compliance checklist on every generated output
